experiment: nsk1 Stage-1 free-generation KEYED-RESCUE probe at R3 (gate NSK1-S1: the two measured B2P keying cells (lh,lt) in {(12,16),(16,16)} at L=24, alpha ladder {0.25,0.5,0.75,1.0}, THREE Sattolo derangement seeds 20260712/13/14, coin + role control series derived from the shared deranged generations, two pre-fixed rescue endpoints R- (integration, echo-proof by sign semantics) and R+ (delivered-conclusion, echo-confounded); the integration probe commissioned by the post-B2P fork rank-1 recommendation and required by ASM-0342)
candidate: nsk1 flagship line (neurosym-kernel-internals): does internally delivered grounding INTEGRATE into free generation - does the only measured-positive delivery channel (B2P PASS-KEYED, echo-grade) rescue text-only failures content-specifically, beyond both the content-free coin null and the role-consistent control?
_placement_note: kot-assess/1 record at registry/assessments/nsk1-stage1.json alongside nsk1-bprime, nsk1-bprime2, nsk1-g2d. IMPORTANT SCOPE: nsk1 has NO frozen SAP, NO results-log, NO verdict object - Stage-1 is a pre-freeze fork diagnostic, every row phase:exploratory (quarantined, uncitable, flips no verdict). This assessment interprets a run whose MECHANICAL gate label is INCONCLUSIVE (spec section 5 rule 7, reached after rules 1-6 each failed to fire). Evidentiary grade throughout: MEASURED-exploratory, strictly below verdict grade. INCONCLUSIVE here closes the flagship internal-steering ARC as designed (ASM-0342 discharges on read-out of either sign); it upgrades nothing, downgrades nothing, and the programme's verdict-grade bottom line (zero audited end-task wins over the kernel-as-text null) is UNCHANGED.
assessor_binding: FABLE interpretive assessment per the kern Fable/Opus execution split: the runner (Opus, experiment-runner role) executed Stage-1 on Modal and reported mechanical facts only; what the numbers MEAN - what INCONCLUSIVE establishes and does not, why it is inconclusive-not-kill, the delivery-topology update, the thesis implications, and the next-step recommendation - is decided here and only here. This record interprets; it does not run, grade, or audit, and it commits the maintainer to nothing. The entire gate was recomputed offline by this role from stage1_rows.jsonl (rescue rates, per-seed coin/role rates, paired b/c counts, exact sign-test p-values, margin key accuracies at all 8 units) with EXACT agreement (see analyst_recount).

stage1.registry_status: nsk1 DRAFT (never frozen); Stage-1 authorised by the maintainer's post-B2P fork choice (registry/assessments/nsk1-bprime2.json fork_recommendation rank 1) under the ASM-0342 sequencing gate, spec docs/next/nsk1-stage1-spec.md (ASM-0400..0404), run 2026-07-10 by the runner role on Modal (A10G, fp32, greedy where generating, chat template), 28,458 rows, 0.531 GPU-h, ~USD 0.58, 1924 s wall, no abort, no cap trip, no partial, all 8 units completed
stage1.mechanical_gate_label: INCONCLUSIVE (spec section 5 rule 7; instrument VALID - no abort, headroom_ok at 0.7912, repro 958/958 vs B2P text-only, all coin validity tripwires clean at z=3.2790: max margin-coin Wilson-LB 0.4545, max emission-coin Wilson-LB 0.0600, zero ties in every arm at every unit)

stage1.cells: 2 cells x 4 alphas = 8 units, all completed: (lh,lt) in {(12,16),(16,16)} literal per ASM-0400 (no grid search); Swept = ALL 200 text-only failures (swept_is_full_F true; the failure population of the 958-item covered corpus is exhausted at n=200); C100 = 100 seed-pinned text-only-correct items, disjoint; swept_overlap_bprime2 = 200 (identical failure set to B2P, consistent with repro 958/958)
stage1.gate_rule: spec section 5 / ASM-0401, evaluated in order: INSTRUMENT-INVALID (no) -> KEYING-NOT-REPLICATED (no: alpha=1.0 keyacc_real UB95 0.8514/0.8868 >= 0.70 at both cells) -> PASS-INTEGRATION-RESCUE (no: fire_minus_units empty) -> PASS-EMISSION-RESCUE-ONLY (no: fire_plus_units empty) -> ROLE-RESCUE-ONLY (no: role_only_hits empty) -> KILL-NO-KEYED-RESCUE (no: kill_all_units_below_ub false) -> INCONCLUSIVE

spec.note: pre-declared ordered decision rule, controls, floors (delta_mean 0.10 / delta_min 0.05 / kill_ub 0.10 / repl 0.70), Bonferroni 0.00625 coin conjunct at ALL THREE seeds, role conjunct 0.05, and post-outcome paths; ASM-0400..0404

predecessors.bprime2: registry/assessments/nsk1-bprime2.json (PASS-KEYED, the echo-grade delivery positive Stage-1 tested for integration)

measurement_refs.scope_note: Every number in this assessment: SmolLM2-1.7B-Instruct pinned commit 31b70e2e869a7173562077fd711b654946d38674, zero-shot, CLUTRR entity form 2, the 958-item covered set (third disclosed patched-probe contact, ASM-0402), fp32 chat template, additive norm-matched contrastive injection at the final prompt-token position, greedy max_new_tokens=16, n=200 swept failures (= full F) per unit, 3 derangement seeds, phase:exploratory. Citing any of them wider re-classifies the citation as EXTRAPOLATION.

_surprise_note: Three things nothing in the registry predicted. (1) The echo-proof integration endpoint R- came back not merely non-significant but POINT-ESTIMATE AT-OR-BELOW the content-free coin null at every one of the 8 units (mean delta vs coin between -0.050 and -0.010), with tight bounds - the 'weak signal lost in wide CIs' picture the sizing arithmetic anticipated for R- did not materialize; what materialized is a near-zero-or-negative NET effect measured with max pooled UB95 0.0384. (2) The label escaped KILL solely through the OTHER endpoint: the echo-confounded R+ at alpha=1.0 carries a sub-floor positive residual (mean delta vs coin +0.075/+0.078) that landed exactly in the spec's pre-computed INCONCLUSIVE-prone band delta in (0.05,0.15). (3) The three-seed derangement requirement was decisively load-bearing: at (12,16)/alpha=1.0 the plus endpoint satisfies ALL THREE fire conjuncts under seed 20260713 or 20260714 alone (coin p 0.0023/0.00036, role p 0.043/0.0063, delta 0.10/0.12) and is blocked only by seed 20260712, whose content-free coin rescue runs at 0.24 - a single-seed design would have declared a false emission-rescue positive at 2 of 3 seed choices.

interpretation.headline: Stage-1 is INCONCLUSIVE on a VALID instrument, and the reading licensed by the spec's own pre-fixed boundaries is two-sided and must be kept two-sided. Side one, re-confirmed: the internal-write channel DELIVERS at echo grade - keying replicated exactly at alpha=1.0 (keyacc_real 0.810/0.850 at (12,16)/(16,16), the same point values B2P measured, UB95 0.8514/0.8868 far above the 0.70 replication floor, now against THREE independent derangement seeds) [MEASURED-exploratory: poc/nsk1/out/stage1/stage1_summary.json sha256 63525fcd...; offline recount exact]. Side two, the probe's actual question, UNRESOLVED: whether that delivered content INTEGRATES into free generation. The echo-proof endpoint R- (rescue under the true-fact minus sign, which echo cannot pass) fired at ZERO of 8 units and sits at-or-below the content-free coin null everywhere (real 0.040-0.125 across the ladder vs coin 0.035-0.240; mean delta vs coin negative at all 8 units; pooled UB95 <= 0.0384 everywhere, versus the 0.10 kill bound) - yet the run is NOT a KILL, because the pre-declared KILL label is a both-endpoints-times-all-8-units conjunction and the echo-confounded R+ endpoint at alpha=1.0 exceeds the kill bound at both cells (pooled UB95 0.1423/0.1390; mean delta vs coin +0.075/+0.078; per-seed coin p down to 3.6e-4 but not < 0.00625 at all three seeds; delta floors unmet). What blocks a clean negative is therefore a sub-floor, echo-confounded, delivered-conclusion residual - not any positive trace on the integration endpoint. Why this does not settle integration negatively either: (a) no per-endpoint KILL label was pre-declared, so no 'integration killed' statement exists to mint; (b) constructively, the R- bound is a NET bound under ASM-0404's deliberately conservative sign semantics - the minus-sign write simultaneously delivers the true fact AND pushes the bridge SURFACE against the gold answer (measured on this run's own C100 frontier: minus-sign breakage 32/34 per 100 at alpha=1.0 with 27/26 of the breaks emitting the bridge name), so 'no integration' and 'integration cancelled by the operator's own anti-gold surface push' are not separated by this design at ANY n; and (c) the R+ residual is consistent with both echo and weak integration, and by construction can never license the integration reading. Net: the internal-write channel is deliverable at echo grade (replicated), and its integration into free generation is UNRESOLVED - bounded near zero NET under this operator, unmeasured under any operator that de-confounds fact delivery from answer-surface push. One further measured novelty: the keying-vs-damage frontier came back co-attenuating - below alpha=1.0 keying decays into the role band (0.685/0.625 at 0.75; 0.54-0.63 at 0.5; 0.54-0.56 at 0.25, vs role 0.505-0.615) while breakage decays in step (32-34% -> 4-5%), so NO strength window exists on this ladder where keying is strong and damage is low.
interpretation.why_inconclusive_not_kill: Mechanically precise, from the full unit_reports (all recomputed offline, exact agreement): labels 1-5 fail cleanly (instrument valid; keying replicated; fire_minus_units = [], fire_plus_units = [], role_only_hits = [] - no unit/endpoint satisfies conjuncts (i)+(iii)). Label 6 (KILL-NO-KEYED-RESCUE) requires pooled UB95 = mean_s(delta) + 1.6449*max_s(SE) < 0.10 for BOTH endpoints at EVERY one of the 8 units: 14 of 16 endpoint-units satisfy it, and the two that do not are BOTH on the echo-confounded plus endpoint at alpha=1.0 - (12,16) UB95 0.1423 and (16,16) UB95 0.1390. The integration endpoint R- is below the kill bound at every unit (max pooled UB95 0.0384, at (0.75,(16,16))); its point estimates never exceed coin (mean delta vs coin: -0.050, -0.022, -0.027, -0.012, -0.012, -0.022, -0.012, -0.010 across the 8 units) and never beat role (one-sided real>role p 0.22-0.98 everywhere). So the run is inconclusive-not-kill NOT because R- is noisy at n=200 - R- is tightly bounded near zero-or-below - but because the pre-declared KILL conjunction spans both endpoints and R+ at alpha=1.0 retains a genuine sub-floor positive trend: per-seed delta vs coin +0.005/+0.100/+0.120 at (12,16) (coin p 0.50/0.0023/0.00036) and +0.090/+0.055/+0.090 at (16,16) (coin p 0.0077/0.0885/0.0066; role conjunct passed all three seeds there), failing the all-seeds 0.00625 conjunct and the delta_mean >= 0.10 floor. That residual sits exactly in the spec's pre-computed INCONCLUSIVE-prone band (delta in (0.05,0.15) at n=200) - the design predicted this outcome class for a true effect of this size, and n cannot be raised on this corpus because Swept already equals the FULL failure set F (n_failures = 200, swept_is_full_F true).

analyst_recount._method: Computed by this role directly from stage1_rows.jsonl (sha256 fd9f4e02...; 28,458 rows: 958 text-only + 300 baseline + 12,800 margin + 12,800 rescue-gen + 1,600 breakage) using stored raw candidate logprobs, per-row coin bits, generations, and correctness bits. All MEASURED-exploratory, same scope as the header.
analyst_recount.gate_offline_recompute: EXACT agreement with the summary at all 8 units on: rescue_real (both endpoints), rescue_coin_s and rescue_role_s at all three seeds, paired b/c discordant counts, exact one-sided sign-test p-values vs coin and vs role, and margin keyacc_real/coin_s/role_s. Zero ties in every arm at every unit (the ties-count-as-failure conservatism was never exercised).
analyst_recount.kill_blocker_attribution: pooled UB95 per endpoint-unit: minus = {0.0027, 0.0277, 0.0260, 0.0384, 0.0355, 0.0185, 0.0231, 0.0229} - all below the 0.10 kill bound; plus = {0.1423, 0.1390, 0.0242, 0.0540, 0.0470, 0.0434, 0.0332, 0.0558} - only the two alpha=1.0 units exceed it. The KILL conjunction failed at exactly 2 of 16 endpoint-units, both plus/alpha=1.0.
analyst_recount.coin_null_heterogeneity: The content-free coin rescue rate at the keying cells is 0.110-0.240 at alpha=1.0 and decays with alpha (0.035-0.075 at 0.25), roughly confirming ASM-0403's 0.10-0.17 sizing band but with real seed heterogeneity: at (12,16)/alpha=1.0 seed 20260712's coin rescue is 0.240 vs 0.145/0.125 for seeds 20260713/14. R- real (0.120/0.125 at alpha=1.0) sits WHOLLY INSIDE the content-free band at every unit - content-free perturbation fully accounts for every rescue the true-fact sign produced.
analyst_recount.single_seed_counterfactual: Instrument lesson, measured on this run: at (12,16)/alpha=1.0 the plus endpoint satisfies all three FIRE conjuncts under seed 20260713 alone (coin p 0.0023, role p 0.0427, delta 0.100) and under seed 20260714 alone (coin p 0.00036, role p 0.0063, delta 0.120), and is blocked only by seed 20260712 (coin p 0.50, delta +0.005, against that seed's 0.240 coin null). A single-derangement design - B2P's shape - would have fired a false-or-at-least-unreplicable emission-rescue positive at 2 of the 3 seed choices. The >= 3-seed conjunction was the load-bearing control this line added, and it held.
analyst_recount.keying_frontier: keyacc_real by unit: 0.810/0.850 (alpha=1.0), 0.685/0.625 (0.75), 0.630/0.540 (0.5), 0.560/0.540 (0.25) vs role 0.505-0.615 and coin 0.455-0.570 throughout. Keying exists cleanly only at alpha=1.0; by alpha<=0.5 it is inside the control band. C100 breakage co-attenuates: minus 32/34 -> 17/13 -> 8/6 -> 4/4 per 100 (bridge-name emission among minus-breaks 27/26 -> 13/8 -> 5/5 -> 3/3), plus 16/13 -> 13/9 -> 5/4 -> 1/1; collapse 0-2 everywhere. Keying and damage rise and fall TOGETHER on this operator.
analyst_recount.keyed_emission_reported_only: keyem_real (strict top-under-plus AND bridge-under-minus) 0.150/0.160 at alpha=1.0 vs keyem_coin 0.065-0.115 and keyem_role 0.55-0.615-band-derived per-seed values; decays to 0.050-0.065 at alpha=0.25. Weak free-generation keyed emission consistent with B2P's breakage asymmetry; reported-only, never gate-bearing.
analyst_recount.cost: 0.531 GPU-h / USD 0.584 / 1924 s wall for 28,458 rows; text-only 0.7912 with 958/958 repro agreement vs B2P (fourth consecutive replication of the R3 host premise); sigma pairwise agreement 0/2/2 (derangements effectively independent); headroom_ok true.

what_stage1_establishes: KEYING REPLICATION (delivery re-confirmed): the B2P echo-grade delivery positive replicates at alpha=1.0 on a fresh run - keyacc_real 0.810/0.850 at (12,16)/(16,16), identical point values to B2P, UB95 0.8514/0.8868 >= 0.70, now against three independent derangement seeds instead of one, with all coin tripwires clean. The single-seed fragility attack on B2P is spent [MEASURED-exploratory: stage1_summary sha256 63525fcd... + offline recount; scope: R3, entity form, alpha=1.0, teacher-forced margins, n=200].

TIGHT NET BOUND ON THE ECHO-PROOF ENDPOINT: R- (rescue under the true-fact minus sign) is at-or-below the content-free coin null at every unit (mean delta vs coin -0.050 to -0.010; never beats role either), with pooled UB95 <= 0.0384 everywhere measured - the NET content-specific integration-rescue increment under THIS operator is bounded well below the 0.10 campaign floor, and below 0.05, at every (cell, alpha) on the frontier. Scope-critical qualifier carried from ASM-0404: this is a NET bound under a sign semantics whose surface push works AGAINST gold; it is not a pure integration null [MEASURED-exploratory: unit_reports + recount].

THE KILL-BLOCKING RESIDUAL IS ECHO-CONFOUNDED AND SUB-FLOOR: R+ (delivered-conclusion sign) separates from coin only at alpha=1.0 (0.245/0.225 vs coin 0.125-0.240; mean delta +0.075/+0.078; strongest per-seed p 3.6e-4) and misses the pre-declared floors and all-seeds conjunct. It is the sole reason the run is not a KILL. By ASM-0404's pre-fixed boundary it can never license an integration claim at any n; at most it keeps the delivered-conclusion use-mode (engine-verified answer delivered internally) alive as a candidate [MEASURED-exploratory: same refs].

KEYING-VS-DAMAGE FRONTIER, ANSWERED NEGATIVE WITHIN SCOPE: there is no alpha on this ladder where keying survives and damage fades - keying collapses into the control band below alpha=1.0 while breakage co-attenuates. The B2P question 'does keying survive at strengths where the plus-sign damage does not?' has a measured answer on this operator: NO; delivery and damage are coupled through the same strength knob [MEASURED-exploratory: margin + breakage tables, both cells, 4 alphas].

THE MULTI-SEED CONTROL REQUIREMENT IS VALIDATED BY COUNTERFACTUAL: content-free rescue varies by derangement seed (0.125-0.240 at the same unit), and a single-seed design would have fired a plus-endpoint positive at 2 of 3 seed choices at (12,16)/alpha=1.0. The 3-seed all-seeds conjunct is now a measured necessity for this probe family, not a stylistic conservatism [MEASURED-exploratory: single_seed_counterfactual in the recount].

INSTRUMENT VALIDITY AND EXHAUSTIVENESS: no aborts, headroom_ok, repro 958/958 (fourth host-premise replication), zero ties, tripwires clean, gate recomputed offline with exact agreement, and Swept = the FULL failure population (200/200) - this run extracted everything this corpus slice has to give at this design [MEASURED-exploratory: summary + recount].
what_stage1_does_not_establish: NOT integration: fire_minus_units is empty; no statement of the form 'internally delivered grounding helps the model generate correct answers' is licensed at any grade. The delivery-topology cell is NOT upgraded.

NOT a kill of integration: the pre-declared KILL label did not fire (blocked by the R+ alpha=1.0 residual), no per-endpoint KILL label was pre-declared so none may be minted post hoc from the R- bounds, and the R- bound is a NET bound under a deliberately conservative operator whose minus sign pushes the wrong-answer surface - 'no integration' vs 'integration cancelled by the operator's own anti-gold push' vs 'integration reachable only under a different operator/read-out family' are NOT separated by this design at any sample size. The cell is NOT downgraded to 'does not help'.

NOT resolvable by re-running bigger: the failure set is exhausted (Swept = full F = 200), so added power requires new items (a fourth disclosed corpus contact) - and even a fired R+ at any n licenses only PASS-EMISSION-RESCUE-ONLY, never integration. 'Higher power on this construct' is not a path to the integration answer; only a redesigned operator/read-out is.
NOT breadth: one host (1.7B), one form (CLUTRR entity), one task family, one operator at one position, two cells, four alphas, n=200. Every widening is EXTRAPOLATION.

NOT safety: the frontier finding is adverse - no measured strength window separates keying from damage on this operator (plus-sign breakage is still 9-13% at alpha=0.75 where keying is already marginal).

NOT a verdict, and NOT citable in one: every row is phase:exploratory pre-freeze diagnostic data under the ASM-0402 quarantine; the programme's verdict-grade bottom line (zero audited end-task wins over the kernel-as-text null) is unchanged; nothing here feeds a freeze without a redesigned DRAFT record and its own gates.
NOT evidence about the text channel or engine-external topologies: g2d's text-delivery negative and the f2b engine-external positive (confounded, audited) are both untouched.
interpretation.delivery_topology_update: The feasibility-synthesis delivery split (engine-external verification | text-content delivery | internal state-space delivery) updates in ONE cell, by QUALIFICATION not by sign change: internal-steering moves POSITIVE-WITH-SCOPE -> POSITIVE-ECHO-GRADE-REPLICATED / INTEGRATION-INCONCLUSIVE [MEASURED-exploratory: delivery (keyed read-out) replicated at alpha=1.0 against 3 derangement seeds; integration into free generation UNRESOLVED - the echo-proof endpoint fired nowhere and is bounded near zero NET (pooled UB95 <= 0.0384) under a conservative anti-gold sign semantics, while the only positive residual (R+ alpha=1.0, mean delta vs coin ~+0.075, sub-floor) is echo-confounded by construction; keying and damage co-attenuate below alpha=1.0, so no low-damage keying window exists on this operator]. The cell is explicitly NOT 'helps generation' and explicitly NOT 'does not help generation'. Text-delivery cell unchanged (negative with measured mechanism, 3 hosts). Engine-external cell unchanged (the only measured end-task win, correct-alignment-specific, confounded, audited). The synthesis document's own cell edit is owned by the synthesis's next revision, not this record (question stub below).

per_thesis_implications.correctness_thesis: The thesis's delivery sub-question now reads: grounding IS deliverable into a model's internal state at echo grade (measured twice, second time against the strongest cheap attack), but whether internally delivered grounding HELPS the model generate correct answers remains OPEN - probed once, honestly, and unresolved: bounded near zero NET under the one operator tried (whose sign semantics is conservative against exactly this measurement), with the only surviving positive residual unable by construction to carry the claim. The correctness thesis remains ALIVE-UNDETERMINED; its internal-delivery leg is neither a proven mechanism for usefulness nor a dead one. The measured-positive usefulness topology is still exclusively engine-external (f2b-shaped, itself confounded pending K-NULL/human-transfer).
per_thesis_implications.efficiency_thesis: No direct update (Stage-1 carries no cost-vs-capability contrast). The ASM-0040 360M-few-shot second-rung revisit clause was gated on Stage-1 showing integration; integration did not show, so that unlock does NOT fire and the clause stays parked. Standing note: the probe class itself remains extremely cheap (USD 0.58 for a 8-unit, 3-seed, 2-endpoint FWER-controlled read-out).
per_thesis_implications.cross_experiment: Two exported lessons. (1) Multi-seed derangement controls are load-bearing, now with a measured counterfactual: the content-free null's seed-to-seed spread (0.125-0.240) is large enough to mint false positives in single-seed designs of this family - any successor two-candidate steering/delivery probe must carry >= 3 independent derangements with an all-seeds conjunct. (2) Pre-declared multi-endpoint KILL conjunctions do exactly what they say: a kill can be blocked by an endpoint the design itself declared unable to carry the interesting claim. Successor specs that want a decisive negative on ONE endpoint must pre-declare per-endpoint kill labels - post hoc per-endpoint reading is forbidden (this record complies: no integration-kill is claimed).

fork_recommendation.spec_branch: INCONCLUSIVE (spec section 5 rule 7) routes to the section 8 catch-all: maintainer fork on any extension, NO automatic spend. ASM-0342 discharges per its own revisit condition (the Stage-1 probe has read out). The maintainer owns the fork; this record recommends within it.
fork_recommendation.recommended: ACCEPT-INCONCLUSIVE-AND-RECORD (rank 1): close the flagship internal-steering arc with the two-stage ledger as measured - B2P: delivery POSITIVE at echo grade; Stage-1: delivery REPLICATED, integration UNRESOLVED with tight net bounds on the echo-proof endpoint and a sub-floor echo-confounded residual on the other - and return the flagship's delivery-topology weight to engine-external designs (the K-NULL ablation and the human f2b-transfer adjudication remain the highest-value open items in the synthesis). WHY NOT the higher-powered rescue probe: (a) there is NO measured positive integration effect size to power against - R- is at-or-below coin everywhere, so a bigger run of this construct powers up a bound already tight; (b) the only positive trend (R+ ~ +0.075) cannot license integration at ANY n by the pre-fixed ASM-0404 boundary, and design-time arithmetic (not evidence) puts even ITS per-seed 0.00625 conjunct at ~n>=540 discordance-adjusted - while the corpus failure population is EXHAUSTED at 200, so added power means new items, a fourth disclosed contact, and heavier freeze burden, all to confirm at best an emission-only label; (c) the run answered the frontier question negatively (keying and damage co-attenuate), removing the cheap-win hypothesis that a lower alpha preserves keying safely. IF the maintainer wants the internal-integration question kept alive (rank 2, conditional): the next spend is a NEW OPERATOR/READ-OUT DESIGN, not a re-run - one that de-confounds fact delivery from answer-surface push (e.g. inject the hop-1 fact FRAME without a name-slot push, or multi-position/earlier-position delivery, or read-out-placement designs), specced fresh with its own gates, per-endpoint kill labels pre-declared, >= 3 derangement seeds, and the fourth corpus contact disclosed. That is the only design class that can separate 'no integration' from 'integration masked by this operator'.
fork_recommendation.alternatives_deprioritised: Higher-n re-run of this construct (reasons a-c above); scale successor (blocked twice over - no integration reading, and ASM-0342's successor constraint below); freezing a redesigned nsk1 DRAFT record around delivered-conclusion emission alone (the R+ residual is sub-floor and unfired - there is not yet a measured emission-rescue effect to build a record on; if the maintainer wants that use-mode, it needs its own fired gate first); treating the R- bound as an integration kill (forbidden: no pre-declared per-endpoint label, and the construct is conservative-confounded).
fork_recommendation.escalation: This recommendation is input to the maintainer's fork; nothing here authorizes spend, a spec freeze, or a line closure beyond recording what was measured.

forks_resolved.fork: post-B2P fork (registry/assessments/nsk1-bprime2.json fork_recommendation rank 1: Stage-1 free-generation keyed-rescue probe before any DRAFT rewrite; sequencing gate ASM-0342)
forks_resolved.resolution: RESOLVED-INCONCLUSIVE: the probe ran valid and complete (8/8 units, 3 seeds, full F), replicated keying at alpha=1.0, and left integration unresolved - no fire on either endpoint, KILL blocked solely by the echo-confounded plus-endpoint residual at alpha=1.0. ASM-0342 discharges per its revisit condition. The internal-steering ARC (B-prime -> B2P -> Stage-1) is CLOSED as a measurement sequence; what remains is a recording/redirect decision, not a pending measurement.
forks_resolved.basis: stage1_summary.json sha256 63525fcd... + the offline gate recompute in this record

forks_resolved.resolution: OPEN - recommendation recorded: rank 1 accept-inconclusive-and-record (two-stage ledger: delivery positive-replicated, integration unresolved; flagship weight returns to engine-external topologies); rank 2, only if the maintainer keeps the internal-integration question alive, a new de-confounded operator/read-out spec - never a higher-n re-run of this construct.

mechanism_state: internal residual-stream channel: POSITIVE-ECHO-GRADE-REPLICATED for delivery (keyacc 0.810/0.850 at alpha=1.0, twice, 3 seeds, tripwires clean) / INTEGRATION-INCONCLUSIVE (echo-proof rescue endpoint at-or-below the content-free null everywhere, pooled UB95 <= 0.0384, under a conservative anti-gold sign semantics; echo-confounded endpoint sub-floor positive at alpha=1.0 only); keying-vs-damage frontier: co-attenuating, no low-damage keying window on this operator; text-delivery comparator: unchanged (dead with measured mechanism, g2d); engine-external verification: unchanged (f2b positive, correct-alignment-specific, confounded, audited); 360M-few-shot second rung: stays parked (its unlock condition - Stage-1 integration evidence - did not arrive)

questions_opened.question: Maintainer: accept-inconclusive-and-record (rank 1 - close the internal-steering arc with the two-stage ledger, redirect flagship weight to engine-external per the synthesis) OR commission a new de-confounded operator/read-out spec for the integration question (rank 2 - fact-frame delivery without answer-surface push / multi-position / read-out placement; per-endpoint kill labels pre-declared; >= 3 seeds; fourth corpus contact disclosed). A higher-n re-run of the Stage-1 construct is NOT on the menu (measured reasons in fork_recommendation).

Extend docs/next/feasibility-synthesis.md's delivery-topology treatment: internal-steering cell POSITIVE-WITH-SCOPE -> POSITIVE-ECHO-GRADE-REPLICATED / INTEGRATION-INCONCLUSIVE with this record's scope string verbatim (no upgrade to 'helps generation', no downgrade to 'does not'). Owned by the synthesis's next revision, not this record.

Successor-spec convention worth registering when next used: probes with multiple endpoints of different claim grades must pre-declare PER-ENDPOINT kill labels if a decisive per-endpoint negative is wanted; Stage-1's both-endpoint KILL conjunction left a tightly-bounded endpoint formally unresolved because a different endpoint blocked the label. No spend; design hygiene only.

_questions_note: est_cost_usd / est_agent_days are STIPULATED dry-plan estimates, never measurements.

ledger_updates.statement: Internal-write delivery replicates: keyed accuracy 0.810/0.850 at (lh,lt)=(12,16)/(16,16) at alpha=1.0 - the same point values as B2P - UB95 0.8514/0.8868 >= 0.70, now against three independent Sattolo derangement seeds with all control tripwires clean; below alpha=1.0 keying decays into the control band (0.685/0.625 at 0.75; 0.54-0.63 at 0.5) while C100 breakage co-attenuates (32-34% -> 4-5%): no measured strength window separates keying from damage on this operator.
ledger_updates.scope: MEASURED-exploratory; n=200 (= full F), 958-item covered set (third disclosed contact), pinned R3 checkpoint, teacher-forced paired margins, fp32; flips no verdict

ledger_updates.statement: Echo-proof integration rescue (R-, true-fact sign) is at-or-below the content-free coin null at every (cell, alpha) unit: real 0.040-0.125 vs coin 0.035-0.240, mean delta vs coin -0.050 to -0.010, pooled UB95 <= 0.0384 everywhere (kill bound 0.10); it never beats the role control either. The only positive rescue residual is the echo-confounded R+ at alpha=1.0 (0.245/0.225, mean delta vs coin +0.075/+0.078, sub-floor, not all-seeds significant). NET bound only: the minus sign's surface push works against gold (ASM-0404 conservatism), so this bounds net rescue under THIS operator, not integration per se.
ledger_updates.scope: MEASURED-exploratory; same scope; the failure population is exhausted (Swept = full F = 200)

ledger_updates.statement: Content-free rescue is seed-heterogeneous (coin rescue 0.125-0.240 across derangement seeds at the same unit), and a single-seed design would have fired a false emission-rescue positive at 2 of 3 seed choices at (12,16)/alpha=1.0 (all three FIRE conjuncts satisfied under seeds 20260713/20260714 alone; blocked only by seed 20260712's 0.240 coin null). The >= 3-seed all-seeds conjunct is a measured necessity for this probe family.
ledger_updates.scope: MEASURED-exploratory; this operationalization at R3 on the entity form

ledger_updates.statement: NSK1-S1: mechanical gate label INCONCLUSIVE; fire_minus_units and fire_plus_units both empty; role_only_hits empty; KILL blocked at exactly 2 of 16 endpoint-units, both the echo-confounded plus endpoint at alpha=1.0 (pooled UB95 0.1423/0.1390 vs bound 0.10); keying replicated; instrument valid; ASM-0342 discharged (Stage-1 has read out); no automatic successor spend - maintainer fork.
ledger_updates.scope: pre-freeze fork decision; nsk1 stays DRAFT/unfrozen; phase:exploratory throughout

assumptions_resolved.outcome: discharged per its own revisit condition
assumptions_resolved.backing_ref: Its revisit clause ('discharged when the Stage-1 probe reads out (either sign)') fired: Stage-1 read out INCONCLUSIVE on a valid instrument. Its substantive protections held to the end - no claim upgrade, no freeze, no scale spend occurred on margin extrapolation; the successor sequencing constraint for THIS outcome is ASM-0503.

assumptions_resolved.outcome: still-open for B2P citations; superseded-for-Stage-1-results by ASM-0500
assumptions_resolved.backing_ref: Per its revisit condition, the Stage-1 probe's own scope rule (ASM-0500) governs Stage-1 results; ASM-0340 continues to govern citation of the B2P numbers themselves. Note its 'keyed free-generation rescue at the pass cells is UNMEASURED' clause is now stale: measured by Stage-1, with the bounds recorded here.

assumptions_resolved.id: ASM-0400/0401/0402 (Stage-1 design frame, decision rule, contact discipline)
assumptions_resolved.backing_ref: All asserts passed, all 8 units completed, ordered rule evaluated mechanically to rule 7, controls derived from shared generations as specified, coin recipe alpha-independent as specified; all 958 items re-touched - three disclosed contacts now bind every future freeze on this corpus (verbatim-disclosure clause).

assumptions_resolved.outcome: resolution path consumed - measured, roughly in-band with seed spread
assumptions_resolved.backing_ref: Measured coin rescue at the keying cells 0.110-0.240 at alpha=1.0 (one seed above band), decaying with alpha. Superseded by measurement within Stage-1's scope; EXTRAPOLATION anywhere else; no longer load-bearing.

assumptions_resolved.outcome: performed-as-designed; its conservatism clause is now the live caveat
assumptions_resolved.backing_ref: The pre-fixed boundary did its job in both directions: it blocks reading the R+ residual as integration, and its own 'conservative because the name-push works against the gold surface' clause is why the tight R- bound cannot be read as an integration kill. Carried forward verbatim into ASM-0500/0501.

assumptions_resolved.id: ASM-0042 (latent rescuability planning band at R3)
assumptions_resolved.backing_ref: Stage-1 measured NET rescue under one conservative operator, not latent rescuability; the band survives only as planning input to any rank-2 redesigned-operator spec, never as a premise.

assumptions_resolved.outcome: still-open; host premise strengthened a fourth time; revisit clause NOT unlocked
assumptions_resolved.backing_ref: text-only 0.7912 with 958/958 agreement vs B2P. The 360M second-rung unlock was conditioned on Stage-1 integration evidence, which did not arrive - the clause stays parked.

assumptions_resolved.backing_ref: That path was scheduled on a Stage-1 PASS; on INCONCLUSIVE it re-gates on the maintainer's rank-2 choice (a new operator spec would inherit it) or lapses with the arc if rank 1 is chosen.

tree_impact: nsk1 stays DRAFT/unfrozen; the internal-steering measurement ARC (B-prime -> B2P -> Stage-1) is CLOSED with gate label INCONCLUSIVE and a complete two-stage ledger: delivery POSITIVE at echo grade and REPLICATED (0.810/0.850, twice, 3 seeds), integration UNRESOLVED (echo-proof endpoint bounded near zero NET under a conservative operator; echo-confounded residual sub-floor at alpha=1.0 only; no fire, no kill). The delivery-topology cell updates by qualification only - POSITIVE-ECHO-GRADE-REPLICATED / INTEGRATION-INCONCLUSIVE - neither 'helps generation' nor 'does not'. ASM-0342 is discharged; ASM-0500..0503 now govern citation, kill-attribution, the frontier reading, and successor sequencing. The flagship's critical path returns to the maintainer fork: record-and-redirect (engine-external topologies per the feasibility synthesis) or a new de-confounded operator spec. No verdict object exists anywhere in this line and nothing here may be cited as one; the programme's verdict-grade bottom line (zero audited end-task wins over the kernel-as-text null) is unchanged.
